description: Scoped per-stage score ranking and component values.
sql:
SELECT * FROM (
SELECT
  s.name AS well_name,
  CAST(s.stage_num_td AS TEXT) AS stage_num,
  s.composite_score,
  s.score_a,
  s.score_b,
  s.score_c,
  s.score_d,
  CASE s.top_driver
    WHEN 'process_stability' THEN 'Process Stability'
    WHEN 'anomaly_burden' THEN 'Event Burden'
    WHEN 'substage_coherence' THEN 'Substage Coherence'
    WHEN 'achievable_telemetry' THEN 'Achievable Telemetry'
    ELSE s.top_driver
  END AS top_driver,
  s.anomaly_count,
  s.substages_present,
  s.design_minutes
FROM featurestore:merged_stage_execution_scores_v1 s
WHERE s.formula_version = :formula_version
  AND s.normalization_version = :normalization_version
  AND s.fleet_name = :fleet_name
  AND s.pad_name = :pad_name
  AND (
    COALESCE(CAST(:well_name AS TEXT), '') IN ('', '__ALL__')
    OR s.name = CAST(:well_name AS TEXT)
  )
ORDER BY s.composite_score, s.name, s.stage_num_td
) q
